task_completion.description: Verify that the bcWebCam settings dialog is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam settings window is visible on the screen, typically accessed via a gear icon.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the output or network configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active tab or section within the settings dialog is related to 'Output', 'Network', 'Web Service', or similar configuration.

task_completion.description: Verify that the HTTP/Web Service output option is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, radio button, or toggle specifically for 'HTTP', 'Web Service', or 'POST' output is checked or turned on.

task_completion.description: Verify the target URL is set exactly to the required endpoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input field for the target URL contains exactly 'http://192.168.1.50:8080/api/v1/scans'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the settings are saved to persist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save', 'OK', or 'Apply' button in the settings dialog, or the dialog is successfully closed after the URL was entered.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the actual bcWebCam application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The window being configured clearly belongs to bcWebCam (check window titles, icons, and UI elements) and not a generic browser or mockup.

integrity.description: Ensure the configuration was done via the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the GUI settings menu rather than a terminal window or command prompt modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just type the URL into a text editor to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL 'http://192.168.1.50:8080/api/v1/scans' is entered into the specific bcWebCam settings field, not Notepad, Word, or a random text file.
